metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Configure metadata providers for movies and TV shows

cinema.title: Cinema Mode
cinema.description: Play trailers and a custom intro video before the main feature

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Recent server activity and user actions

playbackMode.auto: Auto (Direct Play when compatible, Transcode when needed)

tmdb.name: TMDb (The Movie Database)
tmdb.description: TMDb provides posters, backdrops, plot summaries, cast, and genres for your media.
tmdb.v4Token: Custom API Key (v4 Read Access Token)
tmdb.hasBuiltin: A built-in API key is configured by the server administrator — override below only if you want to use your own.
tmdb.noBuiltin: The server administrator has not configured a built-in key. You must add your own API key below or metadata enrichment will be disabled.
tmdb.optional: Optional. Leave blank to use the env key. Get your own free key at themoviedb.org if needed.
tmdb.required: Required for metadata fetching. Get your free key at themoviedb.org
tmdb.placeholderOptional: Leave blank to use env key

omdb.name: OMDb (Open Movie Database)
omdb.description: OMDb provides IMDb ratings, Rotten Tomatoes scores, and Metacritic scores.
omdb.hasBuiltin: A built-in API key is configured by the server administrator — override below only if you want to use your own.
omdb.noBuiltin: The server administrator has not configured a built-in key. Add your own API key below to enable ratings enrichment.
omdb.optional: Optional. Leave blank to use the env key. Get your own free key at omdbapi.com.
omdb.required: Enter your OMDb API key to enable IMDb/Rotten Tomatoes ratings. Get a free key at omdbapi.com.
omdb.placeholder: Leave blank to use env key

tvdb.name: TheTVDB
tvdb.description: TheTVDB provides additional TV series metadata including TVDB IDs and supplementary episode data.
tvdb.hasBuiltin: A built-in API key is configured by the server administrator — override below only if you want to use your own.
tvdb.noBuiltin: The server administrator has not configured a built-in key. Add your own API key below to enable TVDB enrichment.
tvdb.optional: Optional. Leave blank to use the env key. Get your own free key at thetvdb.com.
tvdb.required: Enter your TVDB API key to enable TVDB metadata. Get a key at thetvdb.com.
tvdb.placeholder: Leave blank to use env key

fanart.name: Fanart.tv
fanart.description: Fanart.tv provides high-quality artwork including clearlogos, thumbnails, and HD art.
fanart.hasBuiltin: A built-in API key is configured by the server administrator — override below only if you want to use your own.
fanart.noBuiltin: The server administrator has not configured a built-in key. Add your own API key below to enable Fanart.tv artwork.
fanart.optional: Optional. Leave blank to use the env key. Get your own free key at fanart.tv.
fanart.required: Enter your Fanart.tv API key to enable artwork enrichment. Get a free key at fanart.tv.
fanart.placeholder: Leave blank to use env key

opensubtitles.name: OpenSubtitles
opensubtitles.description: Premium subtitle provider with the largest database. VIP account recommended for best results.

subdl.name: Subdl
subdl.description: Free subtitle provider with large database.
subdl.hasBuiltin: A built-in API key is configured by the server administrator (override below).
subdl.noBuiltin: The server administrator has not configured a built-in key. Add your own API key below to enable Subdl subtitles.

deepl.name: DeepL Translation
deepl.description: AI-powered subtitle translation. Requires a DeepL API key.

messages.howItWorksDescription: During library scan, Velox matches filenames to TMDb entries. NFO files (if present) take priority over TMDb search. Ratings from OMDb are fetched after TMDb matching completes.

playback.auto: Auto (Direct Play when compatible, Transcode when needed)
playback.policyDescription: Choose the server-wide playback behavior. Direct Play streams the original file without modification. Transcoding converts the file for incompatible devices.

subtitles.autoDownloadDescription: Automatically download subtitles for configured languages when scanning new media.
subtitles.targetLanguagesDescription: Comma-separated ISO 639-1 codes (e.g., en,vi,es,fr). Leave empty to disable auto-download.

cinema.enabledDescription: Play a custom intro video and YouTube trailers before the main feature.
cinema.maxTrailersDescription: How many trailers to play before the main feature (0-5).
cinema.customIntroDescription: Upload a custom intro video to play before trailers.
